phases.description: Cancel the root ctx on signal: replace context.Background() in runServeStackless and runApply with signal.NotifyContext; waitForShutdown listens on <-ctx.Done() instead of a local signal channel. Add an integration test that asserts the daemon exits within 15s under SIGTERM.
Defer state.Delete to actual process exit: move it to a defer in runStacklessDaemonChild and runDaemonChild immediately after state.Save succeeds; remove the state.Delete calls from waitForShutdown.

Orphan-discovery fallback in gridctl stop: add state.FindOrphan (port probe + pgrep), --force flag, and actionable error when the state file is missing but a daemon is alive. Add unit tests for orphan handling.
